creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 185503
Update to u2.10.12.17

Update ircu to u2.10.12.17.

Also fix a portlint warning about BROKEN_aarch64 by moving it further up the Makefile.

This is a bugfix and feature release so no merge-quarterly required.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.3/11.1 i386/amd64 at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/undernet-ircu/2.10.12.17/
